operator_description: Reactor Cooling Water System issue: temperature started rising and reactor pressure increased. Operator observed reactor cooling water inlet temp step pattern similar to TEP fault 4.

Separator Cooling Water System issue: cooling outlet temperature fluctuated and control valve hunted. Operator observed condenser cooling water inlet temp random variation pattern similar to TEP fault 12.
A Feed System issue: feed flow dropped suddenly and reactor feed rate became unstable. Operator observed a feed loss pattern similar to TEP fault 6.
Separator Cooling Water System issue: separator temperature and pressure started increasing. Operator observed condenser cooling water inlet temp step pattern similar to TEP fault 5.
Reactor Cooling Water System issue: temperature started rising and reactor pressure increased. Operator observed reactor cooling water inlet temp step pattern similar to TEP fault 4.
A+C Feed System issue: feed pressure dropped and reactor feed became unstable. Operator observed c header pressure loss pattern similar to TEP fault 7.
A Feed System issue: composition analysis changed and product purity moved. Operator observed b composition change pattern similar to TEP fault 2.
Reactor Cooling Water System issue: controller output changed but process variable did not respond. Operator observed reactor cooling water valve sticking pattern similar to TEP fault 14.
Recycle Compressor issue: multiple variables moved abnormally without a clear single alarm. Operator observed unknown disturbance pattern similar to TEP fault 19.
